description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that triggers on push to main, release/*, hotfix/*, and tags matching v[0-9][0-9].[0-9][0-9].[0-9][0-9]. It also triggers on workflow dispatch with inputs for branch, date, sha, and build_type. The workflow has multiple jobs for setting up telemetry, building C++ and Python, uploading conda packages, building docs, building and publishing wheels for C++ and Python, and summarizing telemetry.
